decision_gate.reason: 14 of 16 core commands (88%) are low-portability or Claude-first.

rollout_order.focus: simple local execution commands with minimal orchestration coupling
commands with manageable cluster or interaction coupling after runtime selection exists
commands needing explicit adapter or policy extraction work
research, planning, architecture, and browser-heavy commands retained on Claude

commands.description: Kill port 3000 and start current project's dev server

commands.name: amend
commands.description: Add changes to BUILD spec mid-project (cross-phase amendments)
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: appdesign
commands.description: Load BR3 design system + app design research library into context for frontend work. Use before any frontend implementation.
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: autopilot
commands.description: Automated multi-phase build orchestration — reads BUILD spec, batches phases, runs parallel/sequential, gates for approval
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: begin
commands.description: Begin work - plan, execute, finish (simplified)
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: brainstorm
commands.description: Socratic design exploration with hard gate — no code until approved
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: brief
commands.description: /brief — Developer Brief
commands.status_reason: session helper; auto-runs via hook and is not a migration priority

commands.name: business
commands.description: Business Planning Context: /business

commands.name: cluster-research
commands.description: /cluster-research — Load Cluster Research Context

commands.name: cluster
commands.description: /cluster — BR3 Cluster Management

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Stage all, commit, push, and optionally tag. Use -dev for dev branch only.

commands.name: concise
commands.description: Present plans in plain-language walkthrough format. No code, no tech details. Concepts and flow only.
commands.status_reason: formatting helper, not a substantive runtime workflow

commands.name: dash
commands.description: BR3 Dashboard

commands.name: dbg
commands.description: Debug browser errors - reads browser logs and analyzes issues

commands.name: dead
commands.description: Dead code analysis - find duplicates, semantic duplicates, parallel/competing code, dead code, and race conditions

commands.name: design
commands.description: Interactive design discovery with 4 browseable mockups (3 original + 1 competitor baseline). Produces DESIGN_SPEC.md from a winning direction.
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: device
commands.description: Analyze device.log — SW state, visibility, memory, network, permissions

commands.name: diag
commands.description: Full diagnostic — cross-file correlation across all 4 BR3 logs

commands.name: e2e
commands.description: Run Playwright E2E tests for the most recent work — auto-detects what to test

commands.name: explore-qa
commands.description: Autonomous browser exploration and QA — crawls every page, finds errors, tests forms, checks mobile

commands.name: fixplan
commands.description: Generate a concise fix plan covering ALL issues from the entire session - no code, no action, just the plan

commands.name: gaps
commands.description: Gap detection with safeguards - analyzes build plan, reports issues, fixes only with confirmation
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: geo-coach
commands.description: GEO citation coach for DockeryAI — guides through the 5-stage citation playbook with research-backed methodology

commands.name: geo
commands.description: Load GEO & AI search citation research into context, apply to current session plans

commands.name: guard
commands.description: Guard - Validates work against spec, governance, decisions, and architecture. Prevents drift.
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: hunt
commands.description: Hunt system — research deals, manage hunts, review exceptional finds on the cluster

commands.description: /impact — Cross-Project Impact Analysis

commands.name: intel-review
commands.description: Intelligence review — Opus reasoning pass on high-scoring intel items and exceptional deals

commands.name: later
commands.description: Later - Move features from current build to roadmap (next/later horizons)
portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: learn

portability_rationale: planning/research/design command remains Claude-first by policy

commands.name: preview
commands.description: Deploy current project to Netlify preview via Lomax, return shareable URL

commands.name: production
commands.description: Setup dev/prod architecture - current DB becomes PROD, creates DEV, outputs env vars

commands.name: prompt

commands.description: [Quick] Kill port 3000 and restart npm dev server
commands.status_reason: redundant with /3 and narrower in scope

commands.name: review
commands.description: Re-review current diff — lightweight two-stage review outside /begin

commands.name: roadmap
commands.description: Roadmap - View and manage feature horizons (now/next/later) and releases

commands.name: root
commands.description: Find the root cause - exhaustive analysis with subagents, 100% confirmed, report only (no action)

commands.description: Re-inject project rules into context
commands.status_reason: policy display helper, not a core runtime workflow

commands.name: sales
commands.description: Sales & Marketing Context: /sales

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save session - log decisions, architecture, reasoning, and goals

commands.name: swap
commands.description: Swap active Claude Code account across the cluster (one-year tokens)

commands.description: Toggle between Claude Opus 4.5 and Opus 4.6

commands.name: test
commands.description: Write failing tests for current task, then commit

commands.name: tuning
commands.description: /tuning — Toggle Claude Code Performance Settings

commands.description: /website-build — Intelligence-Driven Website Builder

commands.name: why
commands.description: Diagnose console errors - explains what's wrong, why, and how to fix (no code, no action)

commands.description: Create a git worktree with full project setup — BR3, Claude config, .env, alias
